name: STRUCT-CIP
key_facts: Complies with ACI 318-19 and local building codes
Floor slabs: 4,000 psi minimum at 28 days
Post-tensioned slabs: 5,000 psi minimum at 28 days, high early strength
Standard hook dimensions per ACI 318 Table 25.3.1
Structural steel columns and beams: 2-hour fireproofing per IBC Table 601
Fireproofing material: Spray-applied cementitious, minimum 1.5 inches thick
potential_conflicts: RFI-001: Column spacing at Grid Line C-4 does not match between structural drawings and architectural plans
